Being added to the main verb by means of: a) copula "གི་ཡིན་" or the particle "རྒྱུ་", it denotes future tense: ང་ལྷ་སར་འགྲོ་གི་ཡིན I shall go to Lhasa; ང་རྟ་དེ་ཉོ་རྒྱུ་ཡིན I shall buy that horse; b) the particle "པ་", it denotes past tense: ཁྱེད་རང་ག་པར་ཕེབས་པ་ཡིན Where did you go? 3) yes.
